stemHtml: An aircraft is flying in a control zone with a Secondary Surveillance Radar (SSR) available. ATC has NO SSR capabilities. Which mode should the aircraft squawk?

options.a: Mode C continuously, Mode A upon request.
options.b: Mode A continuously, Mode C upon request.
options.c: Mode S continuously, Mode A only in emergencies.
options.d: Mode A continuously, Mode C when passing through specific altitudes.
